{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/nautilus/ingit-cowork-en/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. ingit-cowork-en

_Файлов:_ 10

h2. Содержание

* [01-cowork-discovery.md|01-cowork-discovery.md] — 
* [02-cowork-provides.md|02-cowork-provides.md] — 
* [03-ingit-provides.md|03-ingit-provides.md] — 
* [04-symbiotic-architecture.md|04-symbiotic-architecture.md] — 
* [05-four-integration-paths.md|05-four-integration-paths.md] — 
* [06-refined-ingit-scope.md|06-refined-ingit-scope.md] — 
* [07-practical-first-steps.md|07-practical-first-steps.md] — 
* [08-implications-nautilus-okwf.md|08-implications-nautilus-okwf.md] — > [!TIP]
* [09-risks-open-questions.md|09-risks-open-questions.md] — > [!TIP]
* [10-strategic-positioning.md|10-strategic-positioning.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [308-table-of-contents|docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/308-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.36)
* [308-table-of-contents|docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/308-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.31)
* [README|docs/autofilled/components/README.md] (сходство 0.19)
